data.title: Amplify has submitted an application for the Bitcoin premium income fund BITY
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bloomberg ETF analyst Eric Balchunas wrote on X that Amplify has submitted an application for the Bitcoin Premium Income Fund (BITY). The fund will sell call options with an exercise price 10% higher than the market to generate income.

data.title: Solana Network Sees 20% Drop In Transactions In Early February
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data shows that on February 1, the Solana network recorded a total of 62.6 million transactions. This marks a 20% decrease from the peak of 76.8 million transactions observed on January 22.

data.title: Amplify Submits Application For Bitcoin Premium Income Fund
data.description: According to Odaily, Bloomberg ETF analyst Eric Balchunas announced on X that Amplify has submitted an application for a Bitcoin Premium Income Fund, with the ticker symbol BITY. The fund aims to generate income by selling call options with strike prices 10% above the market value.

data.title: IG: UK economic data supports expectations of rate cuts, focus on February economic forecasts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News IG Group market analyst Chris Beauchamp pointed out that recent economic data has strengthened the case for the Bank of England to ease monetary policy. UK inflation continues to decline, economic growth remains sluggish, and the labor market shows signs of cooling. Governor Bailey's statement will play an important role in the speed and extent of future interest rate cuts. February economic forecasts may provide a reason for a rate cut. These forecasts will be closely watched by traders. Any downward revisions may strengthen the case for monetary easing. The baseline scenario is a 25 basis point rate cut, and guidance suggests a gradual rate cut in 2025. A more moderate surprise may be that the Bank of England hints that it will accelerate the pace of rate cuts. The least likely but most impactful scenario is a sharp 50 basis point rate cut, which could trigger large market fluctuations in various asset classes. (Jinshi)

data.title: Nasdaq-listed Oxbridge selects Coinbase Prime to support its strategic Bitcoin and Ethereum reserve program
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Nasdaq-listed Oxbridge Re Holdings Limited announced that it has selected Coinbase Prime to support its purchase and secure custody of Bitcoin and Ethereum and other potential cryptocurrencies as treasury reserve assets. 
Earlier, Oxbridge Re Holdings Limited announced that its board of directors had approved the decision to include Bitcoin and Ethereum in its company's reserve assets. This decision reflects its strategy of diversifying financial assets while exploring inflation-resistant assets with long-term growth potential, such as Bitcoin, Ethereum and other potential cryptocurrencies.

data.title: PENDLE rises above 3 USDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News OKX market data shows that PENDLE has risen above 3 USDT and is currently trading at 3.08 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 10.4%.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 580 USDT with a 1.19% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 06, 2025, 06:40 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 580 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 580.73999 USDT, with a narrowed 1.19% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Analysis: The average cost price of Berachain VC is $0.82. In a bull market, the price of BERA will be between $10 and $15.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto researcher and DYθR founder @hmalviya9 published an analysis on Berachain's valuation on X: "Berachain raised $82 million at an average valuation of $414 million by allocating about 34.3% of the supply to VC. The average VC entry price was about $1.207.
If BERA matches SUI's unrealized VC returns (about 15 times), the price should be above $15 at launch, but I think this possibility is low.
If the token matches SEI's unrealized VC returns (about 10 times), the price should be above $10 at launch. Therefore, BERA will be between $10-15 in a bull market and between $5-10 in a bear market."
